approximation_assumptions: [{"code":"omp-region-collapsed-to-task","detail":"Each OpenMP parallel region is collapsed into one simulator task."},{"code":"omp-missing-observed-exec","detail":"Missing observed_exec_ns leaves per-job execution unresolved for device-time resolution."},{"code":"omp-derived-absolute-deadline","detail":"Missing instance absolute_deadline_ns is approximated as release_ns + relative_deadline_ns."}]

[{"code":"omp-region-collapsed-to-task","detail":"Each OpenMP parallel region is collapsed into one simulator task."},{"code":"omp-missing-observed-exec","detail":"Missing observed_exec_ns leaves per-job execution unresolved for device-time resolution."},{"code":"omp-derived-absolute-deadline","detail":"Missing instance absolute_deadline_ns is approximated as release_ns + relative_deadline_ns."}]

[{"code":"karami-paper-profile","detail":"Workload adapted from paper profile 'karami-rt-genai-profile-a' for deterministic simulator replay."},{"code":"karami-burst-window","detail":"Prompt bursts are represented by precomputed release offsets. [rationale: Paper reports burst groups instead of a closed-form arrival model.]"}]

[{"code":"karami-paper-profile","detail":"Workload adapted from paper profile 'karami-rt-genai-profile-a' for deterministic simulator replay."},{"code":"karami-burst-window","detail":"Prompt bursts are represented by precomputed release offsets. [rationale: Paper reports burst groups instead of a closed-form arrival model.]"}]
